Item: Manage production, sales, labour & expenses for your brick factory

BrickPro is a complete brick factory management solution. Track daily production, manage customer sales with challans, monitor labour attendance & payments, record expenses, track fuel consumption, and view detailed profit/loss reports. Features: ✓ Production tracking (raw & fired bricks) ✓ Sales & dispatch management with challans ✓ Customer management with outstanding tracking ✓ Labour attendance & payment management ✓ Expenditure tracking by category ✓ Fuel consumption monitoring ✓ Monthly reports with P&L ✓ Multi-factory support ✓ Hindi & English language ✓ Works offline (PWA) Perfect for brick kiln owners, managers, and supervisors.
brick factory, kiln management, production tracker, business management
